title: Tencent Unveils WorkBuddy Bench: A Coding Intelligent Agent Testing Ground Integrated with Code, Web, Office, and Security
excerpt: Evaluated coding agents have always been confined to isolated fields - fixing bugs on SWE-bench, doing front-end work on Design2Code, and production environment
content_html:
Evaluated coding agents have always been confined to isolated fields - fixing bugs on SWE-bench, doing front-end work on Design2Code, and production environment benchmarks are mostly closed to external audits. Tencent has now brought these four areas together, releasing a multi-domain evaluation suite called WorkBuddy Bench, with the paper published on arXiv. Its most notable feature is not the number of tasks, but that these tasks are designed from the ground up to prevent "memorizing answers."

The entire benchmark spans four work domains: code (repository-level software engineering), web (frontend artifacts), office (multi-file business processes), and security (red and blue teams). The scales are 80, 70, 50, and 60 tasks respectively, totaling 260. The key point is that none of the tasks are derived from any public question bank, but rather reverse-engineered from real code commits, pull requests, or business scenarios, then rewritten into short, colloquial, role-playing-style requests. This ensures that the task prompts cannot be found by searching online for corresponding PRs or commit clues - you can't memorize them. Since the dataset is publicly released (including task directories, environment images, evaluation tools, test cases, and reference solutions), its resistance to contamination comes from this construction method plus version control, rather than keeping the questions hidden.

The four subsets share the same task directory format, but each has its own validation method, so scores cannot be directly compared between subsets. Therefore, Tencent does not report an overall score for the suite. Code tasks are scored based on hidden test pass rates; web tasks use rule checks combined with LLM/VLM evaluation and agent evaluation, requiring delivery of artifacts along a declared path without connecting to the real-time internet; office tasks use deterministic rule checks combined with evidence-based LLM evaluation, with weights ranging from 0.70 to 0.95 favoring rules; security tasks use deterministic scoring.py runs three times and take an average, without using large models as judges. The security subset also includes five layers of anti-cheating measures - disabling literal scanning, renaming inputs, covering tampered tests, encoding dependencies, and low-weight bait, with 38 red team tasks and 22 blue team tasks. White-box audits are anchored on real-world CVEs like binutils, curl, and nginx.

The task construction follows a unified pipeline: source collection, rewriting into real requests, assembling the workspace, isolating assessment assets after rounds, and packaging into independent directories. User data is never touched throughout the process. Code tasks assign five roles (developer, algorithm engineer, product manager, QA, operations), while security tasks assign professional roles, and deliberately provide incomplete information - they don't tell you the target file, pattern, or boundary, so the agent must retrieve the context itself. Scoring assets are introduced only after the agent completes its run, and it never sees them during the process.

The evaluation runs in isolated containers, with the model and sandbox separated. The framework uses CodeBuddy Code (default) and Claude Code, with increased reasoning efforts and a context window of 200k, and WebSearch and AskUserQuestion are disabled. This is important: turning off online search is precisely to verify whether the resistance to contamination is truly effective.

The leaderboard features multiple model families (scores 0–100, thinking mode, three averages). Claude Opus4.8 dominates the majority of the top positions in code, web, office, and security, taking five first places; GLM-5.2 tops two security rankings, and GPT-5.5 takes the office cc first. The framework's sensitivity is also significant - the security subset shows the most dramatic re-ranking, with an average absolute change of 8.6 points; Claude Opus4.8 rejected 13 answers under the cc framework, while GPT-5.5 rejected only 2 under cbc. In terms of efficiency, GPT-5.5 outputs the fewest tokens but maintains a decent score, while DeepSeek-V4-Pro ran 44 rounds on code, with high token input and output, appearing more "demanding."

This ensures that the task prompts cannot be found by searching online for corresponding PRs or commit clues - you can't memorize them. The security subset also includes five layers of anti-cheating measures - disabling literal scanning, renaming inputs, covering tampered tests, encoding dependencies, and low-weight bait, with 38 red team tasks and 22 blue team tasks. The framework's sensitivity is also significant - the security subset shows the most dramatic re-ranking, with an average absolute change of 8.6 points; Claude Opus4.8 rejected 13 answers under the cc framework, while GPT-5.5 rejected only 2 under cbc. In terms of efficiency, GPT-5.5 outputs the fewest tokens but maintains a decent score, while DeepSeek-V4-Pro ran 44 rounds on code, with high token input and output, appearing more "demanding."

sentences.en: The entire benchmark spans four work domains: code (repository-level software engineering), web (frontend artifacts), office (multi-file business processes), and security (red and blue teams).
sentences.zh: 整个基准测试跨越四个工作领域：代码（存储库级软件工程）、Web（前端工件）、办公室（多文件业务流程）和安全性（红队和蓝队）。

sentences.en: The scales are 80, 70, 50, and 60 tasks respectively, totaling 260.
sentences.zh: 量表分别为80、70、50、60个任务，总计260个。

sentences.en: The key point is that none of the tasks are derived from any public question bank, but rather reverse-engineered from real code commits, pull requests, or business scenarios, then rewritten into short, colloquial, role-playing-style requests.
sentences.zh: 关键点是，所有任务都不是源自任何公共问题库，而是根据真实代码提交、拉取请求或业务场景进行逆向工程，然后重写为简短的、口语的、角色扮演风格的请求。

sentences.en: This ensures that the task prompts cannot be found by searching online for corresponding PRs or commit clues - you can't memorize them.
sentences.zh: 这确保了通过在线搜索相应的 PR 或提交线索无法找到任务提示——你无法记住它们。

sentences.en: Since the dataset is publicly released (including task directories, environment images, evaluation tools, test cases, and reference solutions), its resistance to contamination comes from this construction method plus version control, rather than keeping the questions hidden.
sentences.zh: 由于数据集是公开发布的（包括任务目录、环境图像、评估工具、测试用例和参考解决方案），它的抗污染能力来自于这种构建方法加上版本控制，而不是隐藏问题。

blocks.html_en: The four subsets share the same task directory format, but each has its own validation method, so scores cannot be directly compared between subsets. Therefore, Tencent does not report an overall score for the suite. Code tasks are scored based on hidden test pass rates; web tasks use rule checks combined with LLM/VLM evaluation and agent evaluation, requiring delivery of artifacts along a declared path without connecting to the real-time internet; office tasks use deterministic rule checks combined with evidence-based LLM evaluation, with weights ranging from 0.70 to 0.95 favoring rules; security tasks use deterministic scoring.py runs three times and take an average, without using large models as judges. The security subset also includes five layers of anti-cheating measures - disabling literal scanning, renaming inputs, covering tampered tests, encoding dependencies, and low-weight bait, with 38 red team tasks and 22 blue team tasks. White-box audits are anchored on real-world CVEs like binutils, curl, and nginx.

sentences.en: The four subsets share the same task directory format, but each has its own validation method, so scores cannot be directly compared between subsets.
sentences.zh: 四个子集共享相同的任务目录格式，但每个子集都有自己的验证方法，因此子集之间的分数无法直接比较。

sentences.en: Therefore, Tencent does not report an overall score for the suite.
sentences.zh: 因此，腾讯并未报告该套件的总体评分。

sentences.en: Code tasks are scored based on hidden test pass rates; web tasks use rule checks combined with LLM/VLM evaluation and agent evaluation, requiring delivery of artifacts along a declared path without connecting to the real-time internet; office tasks use deterministic rule checks combined with evidence-based LLM evaluation, with weights ranging from 0.70 to 0.95 favoring rules; security tasks use deterministic scoring.py runs three times and take an average, without using large models as judges.
sentences.zh: 代码任务根据隐藏的测试通过率进行评分； Web 任务使用规则检查与 LLM/VLM 评估和代理评估相结合，要求沿着声明的路径交付工件，而无需连接到实时互联网；办公室任务使用确定性规则检查与基于证据的LLM评估相结合，权重范围从0.70到0.95有利于规则；安全任务使用确定性评分。py运行3次取平均值，不使用大型模型作为评判。

sentences.en: The security subset also includes five layers of anti-cheating measures - disabling literal scanning, renaming inputs, covering tampered tests, encoding dependencies, and low-weight bait, with 38 red team tasks and 22 blue team tasks.
sentences.zh: 安全子集还包括五层反作弊措施——禁用文字扫描、重命名输入、覆盖篡改测试、编码依赖性和低权重诱饵，其中包括 38 个红队任务和 22 个蓝队任务。

sentences.en: White-box audits are anchored on real-world CVEs like binutils, curl, and nginx.
sentences.zh: 白盒审核基于现实世界的 CVE，例如 binutils、curl 和 nginx。

blocks.html_en: The task construction follows a unified pipeline: source collection, rewriting into real requests, assembling the workspace, isolating assessment assets after rounds, and packaging into independent directories. User data is never touched throughout the process. Code tasks assign five roles (developer, algorithm engineer, product manager, QA, operations), while security tasks assign professional roles, and deliberately provide incomplete information - they don't tell you the target file, pattern, or boundary, so the agent must retrieve the context itself. Scoring assets are introduced only after the agent completes its run, and it never sees them during the process.

sentences.en: The task construction follows a unified pipeline: source collection, rewriting into real requests, assembling the workspace, isolating assessment assets after rounds, and packaging into independent directories.
sentences.zh: 任务构建遵循统一的流程：源收集、重写为真实请求、组装工作空间、轮次后隔离评估资产、打包到独立目录中。

sentences.en: User data is never touched throughout the process.
sentences.zh: 整个过程中绝不会触及用户数据。

sentences.en: Code tasks assign five roles (developer, algorithm engineer, product manager, QA, operations), while security tasks assign professional roles, and deliberately provide incomplete information - they don't tell you the target file, pattern, or boundary, so the agent must retrieve the context itself.
sentences.zh: 代码任务分配五个角色（开发人员、算法工程师、产品经理、QA、运营），而安全任务则分配专业角色，并故意提供不完整的信息——它们不会告诉你目标文件、模式或边界，因此代理必须检索上下文本身。

sentences.en: Scoring assets are introduced only after the agent completes its run, and it never sees them during the process.
sentences.zh: 评分资产仅在代理完成运行后才会引入，并且在此过程中它永远不会看到它们。

blocks.html_en: The evaluation runs in isolated containers, with the model and sandbox separated. The framework uses CodeBuddy Code (default) and Claude Code, with increased reasoning efforts and a context window of 200k, and WebSearch and AskUserQuestion are disabled. This is important: turning off online search is precisely to verify whether the resistance to contamination is truly effective.

sentences.en: The evaluation runs in isolated containers, with the model and sandbox separated.
sentences.zh: 评估在隔离的容器中运行，模型和沙箱是分开的。

sentences.en: The framework uses CodeBuddy Code (default) and Claude Code, with increased reasoning efforts and a context window of 200k, and WebSearch and AskUserQuestion are disabled.
sentences.zh: 该框架使用 CodeBuddy Code（默认）和 Claude Code，增加推理工作量和 200k 的上下文窗口，并且禁用 WebSearch 和 AskUserQuestion。

sentences.en: This is important: turning off online search is precisely to verify whether the resistance to contamination is truly effective.
sentences.zh: 这一点很重要：关闭网上搜索正是为了验证抗污染是否真正有效。

blocks.html_en: The leaderboard features multiple model families (scores 0–100, thinking mode, three averages). Claude Opus4.8 dominates the majority of the top positions in code, web, office, and security, taking five first places; GLM-5.2 tops two security rankings, and GPT-5.5 takes the office cc first. The framework's sensitivity is also significant - the security subset shows the most dramatic re-ranking, with an average absolute change of 8.6 points; Claude Opus4.8 rejected 13 answers under the cc framework, while GPT-5.5 rejected only 2 under cbc. In terms of efficiency, GPT-5.5 outputs the fewest tokens but maintains a decent score, while DeepSeek-V4-Pro ran 44 rounds on code, with high token input and output, appearing more "demanding."

sentences.en: The leaderboard features multiple model families (scores 0–100, thinking mode, three averages).
sentences.zh: 排行榜具有多个模型系列（分数 0-100、思维模式、三个平均值）。

sentences.en: Claude Opus4.8 dominates the majority of the top positions in code, web, office, and security, taking five first places; GLM-5.2 tops two security rankings, and GPT-5.5 takes the office cc first.
sentences.zh: Claude Opus4.8 在代码、Web、办公和安全方面占据了大部分顶级位置，包揽了五个第一； GLM-5.2 在两项安全排名中名列前茅，GPT-5.5 拿下 Office cc 第一名。

sentences.en: The framework's sensitivity is also significant - the security subset shows the most dramatic re-ranking, with an average absolute change of 8.6 points; Claude Opus4.8 rejected 13 answers under the cc framework, while GPT-5.5 rejected only 2 under cbc.
sentences.zh: 该框架的敏感性也很重要——安全子集显示出最引人注目的重新排名，平均绝对变化为 8.6 点； Claude Opus4.8 在 cc 框架下拒绝了 13 个答案，而 GPT-5.5 在 cbc 下仅拒绝了 2 个答案。

sentences.en: In terms of efficiency, GPT-5.5 outputs the fewest tokens but maintains a decent score, while DeepSeek-V4-Pro ran 44 rounds on code, with high token input and output, appearing more "demanding."
sentences.zh: 从效率上看，GPT-5.5输出的token最少，但保持了不错的成绩，而DeepSeek-V4-Pro在代码上运行了44轮，token输入和输出较高，显得更加“苛刻”。

content_html_zh:
评估的编码代理始终局限于孤立的领域——修复 SWE-bench 上的错误、在 Design2Code 上进行前端工作，而生产环境基准大多不对外部审计开放。 腾讯现已将这四个领域结合在一起，发布了名为 WorkBuddy Bench 的多领域评估套件，论文发表在 arXiv 上。 它最显着的特点不是任务的数量，而是这些任务是从头开始设计的，以防止“记住答案”。

整个基准测试跨越四个工作领域：代码（存储库级软件工程）、Web（前端工件）、办公室（多文件业务流程）和安全性（红队和蓝队）。 量表分别为80、70、50、60个任务，总计260个。 关键点是，所有任务都不是源自任何公共问题库，而是根据真实代码提交、拉取请求或业务场景进行逆向工程，然后重写为简短的、口语的、角色扮演风格的请求。 这确保了通过在线搜索相应的 PR 或提交线索无法找到任务提示——你无法记住它们。 由于数据集是公开发布的（包括任务目录、环境图像、评估工具、测试用例和参考解决方案），它的抗污染能力来自于这种构建方法加上版本控制，而不是隐藏问题。

四个子集共享相同的任务目录格式，但每个子集都有自己的验证方法，因此子集之间的分数无法直接比较。 因此，腾讯并未报告该套件的总体评分。 代码任务根据隐藏的测试通过率进行评分； Web 任务使用规则检查与 LLM/VLM 评估和代理评估相结合，要求沿着声明的路径交付工件，而无需连接到实时互联网；办公室任务使用确定性规则检查与基于证据的LLM评估相结合，权重范围从0.70到0.95有利于规则；安全任务使用确定性评分。py运行3次取平均值，不使用大型模型作为评判。 安全子集还包括五层反作弊措施——禁用文字扫描、重命名输入、覆盖篡改测试、编码依赖性和低权重诱饵，其中包括 38 个红队任务和 22 个蓝队任务。 白盒审核基于现实世界的 CVE，例如 binutils、curl 和 nginx。

任务构建遵循统一的流程：源收集、重写为真实请求、组装工作空间、轮次后隔离评估资产、打包到独立目录中。 整个过程中绝不会触及用户数据。 代码任务分配五个角色（开发人员、算法工程师、产品经理、QA、运营），而安全任务则分配专业角色，并故意提供不完整的信息——它们不会告诉你目标文件、模式或边界，因此代理必须检索上下文本身。 评分资产仅在代理完成运行后才会引入，并且在此过程中它永远不会看到它们。

评估在隔离的容器中运行，模型和沙箱是分开的。 该框架使用 CodeBuddy Code（默认）和 Claude Code，增加推理工作量和 200k 的上下文窗口，并且禁用 WebSearch 和 AskUserQuestion。 这一点很重要：关闭网上搜索正是为了验证抗污染是否真正有效。

排行榜具有多个模型系列（分数 0-100、思维模式、三个平均值）。 Claude Opus4.8 在代码、Web、办公和安全方面占据了大部分顶级位置，包揽了五个第一； GLM-5.2 在两项安全排名中名列前茅，GPT-5.5 拿下 Office cc 第一名。 该框架的敏感性也很重要——安全子集显示出最引人注目的重新排名，平均绝对变化为 8.6 点； Claude Opus4.8 在 cc 框架下拒绝了 13 个答案，而 GPT-5.5 在 cbc 下仅拒绝了 2 个答案。 从效率上看，GPT-5.5输出的token最少，但保持了不错的成绩，而DeepSeek-V4-Pro在代码上运行了44轮，token输入和输出较高，显得更加“苛刻”。
